description:
You are acting as a configuration-manager who must keep a daily record of every Apptainer/Singularity image that exists anywhere in your account.

    1. Scan the entire /home/user hierarchy for files that end with the extension “.sif”.  
    2. Alphabetically sort the full, absolute paths you discover.  
    3. Create the directory /home/user/container_audit if it does **not** already exist.  
    4. Write a snapshot file called  
       /home/user/container_audit/images_snapshot_2023-10-03.log  

       • The very first line of the file **must be exactly**:  
         Container Images Snapshot - 2023-10-03  

       • Beginning on the second line, list the sorted, absolute paths of every “.sif” file you found, one path per line.  
       • Do not add any extra blank lines or spaces.  
       • Ensure there is a single trailing newline at the end of the last line.

    You must accomplish the entire task with a single shell command (you may use pipes).  
    No manual editing of the file after the command is allowed.  

    The automated tests will verify:  
    • The file /home/user/container_audit/images_snapshot_2023-10-03.log exists.  
    • The first line matches the required header verbatim.  
    • The remaining lines list every “.sif” file located under /home/user (and only those files) in strict lexicographical order.  
    • The log file ends with exactly one newline character.  
    • The operation was performed with one command.
truth:
<!-- Files that already exist before the task starts -->
    /home/user/images/ubuntu_latest.sif
    /home/user/images/debian_tools.sif
    /home/user/images/archdev.sif
    /home/user/archive/old_centos.sif

    <!-- Directory that may or may not exist at start -->
    /home/user/container_audit          (may be absent; agent must create)

    <!-- Verification data: exact expected content of the new log -->
    Expected-log-path: /home/user/container_audit/images_snapshot_2023-10-03.log

    Expected-log-content (including final trailing newline):

    Container Images Snapshot - 2023-10-03
    /home/user/archive/old_centos.sif
    /home/user/images/archdev.sif
    /home/user/images/debian_tools.sif
    /home/user/images/ubuntu_latest.sif

    <!-- A single newline character follows the last line above -->
name: task_000000_0af3828e
